calendar.matters:
PETITION RE SUBSTITUTED JUDGMENT TRUST
Off Calendar Oct-19-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Randall Schmidt for Kwok Yuen "Kevin" Leung.

Mr. Schmidt stated that this petition should be dismissed without prejudice and that the same has been entered in San Mateo County. The Court took the petition re substituted judgment off calendar.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

PETITION RE SUBSTITUTED JUDGMENT TRUST
Off Calendar Sep-21-2015 Continued To Oct-19-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Randall Schmidt for (petitioner) Kevin Leung.

The Court asked about the response to the probate examiner's notes. Mr. Schmidt stated that he will respond this week and that he needs to make amendments to the trust and comply with rule 7903. The Court stated that the first order of business is to respond to the probate examiner. Mr. Schmidt stated that this matter is trailing the probate matter, that his client has been ill and has been unable to deal with this until last week, that they have dealt with the settlement and need to give notice to DHS and that they request that this matter be continued until after the probate matter. The petition re substituted judgment trust was continued to October 19, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

PETITION RE SUBSTITUTED JUDGMENT TRUST
Off Calendar Jun-22-2015 Continued To Jul-06-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Randall Schmidt for (petitioner) Kwok Yuen Kevin Leung.

The Court stated that it needs courtesy copies of the petition. Mr. Schmidt stated that the examiner's notes only indicated a request for a waiver of notice and a proposed order, that he did not receive notes asking for a copy of the petition, that he did not receive notes prior to this hearing and provided an endorsed filed copy of the petition to the court. The petition re a substituted judgment trust was continued to July 6, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to allow time for review of the petition.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
